params.TriggerDescription: Whenever CARDNAME attacks, exile up to one target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. Copy it. You may cast the copy.

params.Description: This spell costs {U} less to cast for each instant and sorcery spell you've cast this turn.
You may cast CARDNAME from your graveyard by exiling four instant and/or sorcery cards from your graveyard in addition to paying its other costs.
